C++.title: Easy to Use
C++.description: Docusaurus was designed from the ground up to be easily installed and used to get your website up and running quickly

C++.title: Focus on What Matters
C++.description: Docusaurus lets you focus on your docs, and we'll do the chores. Go ahead and move your docs into the docs directory.
